name: ring:creating-grafana-dashboards
description: Author Grafana dashboards for Lerian Go services rooted in real lib-observability telemetry (tracing, metrics, log, constants). Three phases — Sweep (telemetry inventory), Iterate (PM deliberation on SLIs/SLOs and alerts), Author (Grafonnet libsonnet → JSON in CI) — and installs a blocking CI drift gate. Use when scaffolding dashboards, building a telemetry dictionary, or auditing observability. Skip if service is non-Go, emits no telemetry, or task is just folder organization.
